## Meeting Purpose

[Conduct a high-level feedback session on the GrowthX-Flosum partnership and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Matt is new to Flosum (1.5-2 months) and still getting up to speed on the GrowthX partnership](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Current focus: drive revenue, build brand awareness, increase pipeline stage conversions](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [GrowthX's new internal workflow platform offers potential for more customized content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Opportunity to expand content focus beyond backup/archive to include DevOps product](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Context and Goals

  - [Matt joined Flosum \~1.5-2 months ago, started on day of first GrowthX meeting](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Initial strategy set before Matt's arrival, focusing on one product line](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Current goals: drive revenue, build brand awareness, increase pipeline stage conversions](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [14 articles published, more in pipeline at various stages](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution

  - [Matt open to mixing in other topics once good volume of content is achieved](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Potential to build long-tail content on successful niches, develop gated content](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Initial calibration phase complete; content quality improving](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Some early concerns about product accuracy, requiring internal review](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### GrowthX's New Workflow Platform

  - [Recently implemented internal workflow platform for executing account workflows](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [Editable organization artifacts (CTAs, personas, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Customizable workflow generation (assignments, article creation, fact-checking)](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [SEO analysis and FAQ generation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Platform to be exposed to clients in \~2 months](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Keyword and SEO Strategy

  - [Matt inquired about frequency of keyword updates](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [GrowthX planning session on LLM search influence on keywords](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Upcoming deeper training on LLM-related search areas in next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

### Product Focus and Content Direction

  - [Current emphasis on backup and archive product content](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Potential to expand focus to include DevOps product](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Matt to discuss internally about balancing product focus and overall brand keywords](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to initiate conversation about expanding content topics beyond initial focus](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

  - [GrowthX team to send recent podcast episode with Scrunch CEO to Matt](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Matt to discuss internally about expanding content focus to DevOps product](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Continue refining content quality and brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/p2ZXbxQVrYsznhoakqqkDy-CtszrPpBs?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
